name: Peanut Butter Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Liquid honey or corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed corn flakes, shredded coconut, peanut butter, and liquid honey or corn syrup in a bowl.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Scoop out 2 teaspoons of the mixture and shape into small balls.
4. Roll each ball in the remaining crushed corn flakes.
5. Place the nuggets on a tray lined with parchment paper and refrigerate until firm.
6. Once firm, transfer the nuggets to a covered container and store in the refrigerator.
- Yield: 18 nuggets, each serving 1 nugget
- Nutrition Information: Each serving contains 1/2 fruit & veg choice, 1 fat & oils choice, 5 g carbohydrate, 2 g protein, 4 g fat, and 64 calories.
